mapper.insert: INSERT INTO novel (novel_id, title, genre, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{novelId}, #{title}, #{genre}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE novel SET title = #{title}, genre = #{genre}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE novel_id = #{novelId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, novel_id, title, genre, status, create_time, update_time FROM novel WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, novel_id, title, genre, status, create_time, update_time FROM novel WHERE genre = #{genre} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
